spec_match.rationale: The tool exposes auto, spaces, and legacy none while generated markup includes rp fallback brackets for non-ruby browsers.

interactive.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP clicked all presets, added/deleted/cleared a pair, toggled overhang and writing mode, and exercised Copy without console errors.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index and page both describe a live authoring tool that emits HTML and CSS.

edge_cases.rationale: Copied/generated HTML now always includes rp fallback parentheses, and clipboard denial is handled without an unhandled rejection.

references.rationale: The page now embeds the ChromeStatus feature link and CSS Ruby Layout spec link.

design_system.rationale: The page uses shared CSS variables, explicit button color pairs, and labels are associated with their form controls.

summary: Generated ruby now includes rp fallback brackets, the page carries canonical references, form labels are associated, and Copy has a graceful failure path. Chrome DevTools MCP found no console errors.
